title: Nexus Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nexus Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
